footer.description: Preserving and sharing cultural heritage through collaborative digital innovation.

hero.title: Discover Riobamba's Cultural Heritage
hero.subtitle: Explore, learn, and contribute to preserving our cultural treasures through collaborative digital innovation.

map.title: Interactive Heritage Map
map.subtitle: Click on markers to explore heritage sites in Riobamba

learn.title: Learn
learn.desc: Discover educational content about Riobamba's rich cultural heritage

explore.title: Explore
explore.desc: Navigate interactive maps and discover heritage sites near you

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.desc: Share knowledge and help preserve our cultural heritage for future generations

offline.mustBeOnline: You need to be online to download an area for offline use.
offline.downloadError: Offline download failed. Please try again.

header.subtitle: Learn
header.title: Learning resources by level
header.description: Filter educational materials using LOM metadata (resource type, context, difficulty, language) to find the best match for a learner’s level.

filters.noResults: No resources match the selected filters.

labels.loadError: Unable to load learning resources right now.

ai.metadataApplied: Suggested metadata applied. Review it before continuing.
ai.metadataKeywordsOnly: AI suggested keywords. Review them below.
ai.metadataNothing: AI couldn't suggest metadata for this resource.
ai.rateLimited: Too many AI requests. Please try again shortly.
ai.educationalApplied: Suggested educational metadata applied. Review and edit it.

myContributions.title: My Contributions
myContributions.loginRequiredText: Please log in to view your contributions.

detail.relationsNeedMoreMedia: Attach at least two media files to relate them.
detail.relationsMissingLom: This item has no LOM metadata yet.
detail.notFoundDesc: The heritage item you are looking for does not exist.
detail.noEducationalYet: No educational metadata yet. Use “Edit” to add it.

annotations.title: Community Annotations
annotations.emptyDesc: Be the first to share your observations about this heritage item.
annotations.loginReq: to add your own annotations and contribute to the community knowledge.

form.title: Add Your Annotation
form.placeholder: Share your observations, knowledge, or memories about this heritage item...
form.reward: You'll earn 10 points for adding an annotation!
form.errorEmpty: Please enter some content for your annotation.
form.errorSubmit: Failed to create annotation. Please try again.

routesUi.createRouteDesc: Combine multiple heritage items into a route visitors can follow.

states.addAtLeastOneStop: Add at least one stop by searching for heritage items above.

progress.title: Progress
progress.allVisited: All stops visited. You can complete the route.

stop.arrivalInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., Meet at the main entrance

builder.aiHint: AI proposes a description, theme, difficulty and duration from the stops.
builder.confirmDelete: Delete this route? This cannot be undone.
builder.confirmArchive: Archive this route? It will no longer appear in the public catalogue.
builder.notAllowedToEdit: You do not have permission to edit this route.

offline.title: Offline use
offline.description: Download this route's map, data and content to follow it without coverage.
offline.confirm: This will download about {count} map tiles plus the stops' content. Continue?
offline.mustBeOnline: You must be online to download.

nearby.unsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.

directions.title: Turn-by-turn directions
directions.subtitle: Walking directions to follow the route.

maneuvers.end_of_road_left: At the end of the road, turn left
maneuvers.end_of_road_right: At the end of the road, turn right

step1.wait: Please wait, this can take a moment.
step1.instruction: Optional: add one resource (image, audio, video, or PDF). If you don’t have a file, choose “Text / no upload” and continue.
step1.noUploadNeeded: No upload needed. You can add the text description on the next step.

errors.selectFile: Upload a file, or choose “Text / no upload” to continue.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload. Please try again.

step1.uploadingWait: Please wait, this can take a moment.

fields.addressPlaceholder: e.g., Corner of 5th Ave and Main St

actions.error: Failed to submit contribution. Please try again.

successPage.title: Contribution Submitted!
successPage.message: Thank you for your contribution. It has been received and will be reviewed by our platform curators shortly. You will be notified once it is validated and published.
successPage.offlineQueued: You appear to be offline. Your contribution has been saved and will automatically sync when you're back online.

step5edu.instruction: Describe the resource’s pedagogical intent so it can be reused in the classroom. Everything is optional: you can fill it with AI and edit, or complete it later.

help.learningTime: ISO-8601 duration format (PT30M = 30 minutes, PT1H30M = 1 h 30 min).

loginRequired.title: Login Required
loginRequired.description: You need to be logged in to contribute heritage items to the platform. Join our community to help preserve our history.

errors.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.
errors.registerFailed: Could not create the account. Please try again.

aiSuggestions.title: AI Suggestions
aiSuggestions.intro: Proposals generated by AI when contributions are created. Approve to apply them, or reject.

resources.title: Manage Resources
resources.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this resource? This cannot be undone.

prefs.emailUpdatesDesc: Receive a weekly summary of popular heritage items.

errors.incompleteClassification: Fill in each classification’s system and entry, or remove it, before saving.

teach.subtitle: For teachers
teach.title: Classroom resources
teach.description: Package whole cultural routes as interoperable learning packages (SCORM / cmi5) ready for your LMS.
teach.formatHelp: SCORM 1.2 is the most compatible; SCORM 2004 adds sequencing; cmi5 uses xAPI (requires an LRS).

lessonPlans.title: Lesson plans
lessonPlans.subtitle: Design learning sequences that connect heritage, routes and resources.
lessonPlans.noActivities: No activities yet. Add the first one.

empty.title: No lesson plans yet
empty.description: Create your first plan to sequence content into a classroom experience.

ai.filled: Draft generated. Review and edit it before saving.
ai.replaceMessage: AI will replace the current objectives and activities with a new draft.

detail.notFoundMessage: This lesson plan does not exist or is not public.

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.needHeritage: Link a heritage item to this activity to add a quiz.
quiz.noLom: This item has no educational (LOM) layer yet to attach questions to.

aiUsage.title: AI usage & cost
aiUsage.subtitle: Token consumption and estimated cost of AI operations.
